lines.en: Hello! You have a package. Are you the person named on the order?
lines.zh: 你好！你有一个快递。你是收件人吗？

lines.en: Yes, that is me. Let me see. What is inside?
lines.zh: 是的，是我。让我看看。里面是什么？

lines.en: It is from Shanghai. Please sign your name here.
lines.zh: 是从上海寄来的。请在这里签个名。

lines.en: Okay, let me grab a pen. Do I need to show you my ID?
lines.zh: 好的，我拿支笔。需要出示身份证吗？

lines.en: No, a signature is enough this time. The package is not too heavy.
lines.zh: 不用，这次签个名就够了。这个包裹不太重。

lines.en: That is great. Oh wait, I think there should be two packages.
lines.zh: 太好了。哦等等，应该有两个包裹才对。

lines.en: Let me check my list. Yes, you are right. The other one is in the truck.
lines.zh: 我查一下清单。是的，你说得对。另一个在车上。

lines.en: I will wait here. Take your time.
Here you go. Have a nice day!
lines.zh: 给你。祝你有美好的一天！
